title: Rental Deposit Assistance * Homelessness Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Rental Deposit Assistance * Homelessness Issues 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Agricultural Laborers AIDS/HIV Families with Children Foster Children Homeless Veterans Homeless Youth Homelessness Issues LGBTQ2+ Individuals Medicaid Recipients Native American Community * Homelessness Issues Older Adults Pregnant Individuals Slavic Community Veterans Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF BROOKINGS CORE RESPONSE PEER HOUSE NAVIGATION CENTER RAPID REHOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Registration and referral for Oregon Health Plan's Health Related Social Needs program. Case Managers provide housing barrier assessments, work with Housing Navigators and outside agencies offering support and financial assistance to cover rental application fees, rental deposits, and moving costs. 16389 Highway 101 S Brookings, OR 97415 Eligibility: Unhoused individuals and families Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-3pm Email (541) 251-0825 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BROOKINGS CORE RESPONSE RAPID REHOUSING
